_comment: Source-side soundboard manifest. This file is the single source of truth for what plays on each bank/slot and what it is called. Run 'uv run python tools/convert_audio.py' to convert source WAVs and regenerate firmware/sounds/manifest.json. Never edit firmware/sounds/manifest.json by hand.
_workflow: 1) Import a Freesound license file with tools/import_freesound.py to get stub entries and populate sources.tsv. 2) Drop source files into assets/audio/source/soundboard/ (original names, no rename needed). 3) Paste stubs here, set bank/slot, fill in labels. 4) Run convert_audio.py.
_source_paths: The 'source' field in each slot is relative to assets/audio/source/. Soundboard files live in soundboard/ with their original download names. Example: 'soundboard/832418__kodshin__bubble-button.wav.wav'
